final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing UI design system in classic minimalist tech style for web dashboards, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: clean minimalist tech UI system, Swiss design meets futuristic interface, inspired by Apple Human Interface Guidelines and Tesla dashboard aesthetics
Composition: modular component library layout with dashboard grid, mobile viewport mockup, card variations, button states, and control elements arranged in systematic hierarchy
Subject: comprehensive UI component set including data visualization dashboard, mobile app screens, modular cards with depth layering, primary/secondary/ghost buttons, toggle switches, sliders, and input fields
Scene/backdrop: neutral dark mode interface environment with subtle gradient depth, floating panels with glassmorphism accents
Lighting/mood: soft ambient glow from active elements, subtle edge highlights on interactive components, focused and professional atmosphere
Color palette: deep charcoal base (#1a1a2e), electric blue accent (#00d4ff), soft white text hierarchy, subtle purple gradients for depth layers
Materials/textures: matte surface finish with micro-texture grain, soft glass blur on overlays, crisp vector edges, subtle inner shadows for elevation
Constraints: must maintain accessibility contrast ratios; components must scale from mobile to desktop; dark mode primary with light mode variant support
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; excessive gradients; drop shadows that look dated; neon overload; cluttered information density; generic Bootstrap styling
